info.title: Ticketeer API
info.description: Manages all data used on ticketeer.se. This API exposes all back-end functionality ticketeer is built on and can, if used responsibly, be used for third party applications.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description:
JWT-based authentication (HS256, 15-minute token expiry).

## Login flow

1. **POST /login** with `username` and `password` to receive a JWT token
2. Include the token in subsequent requests as a `Bearer` header:
   ```
   Authorization: Bearer <token>
   ```
3. Tokens expire after **15 minutes** — use **POST /v1/token** with a valid token to renew it

file.description: File to attach to the task

task_column.description: Column ID the task belongs to

task_title.description: Task title (auto-generated from description if omitted)

task_color.description: Task colour label (e.g. green, blue, red)

user_mail.description: Email address of user to invite

timer_task_id.description: Task ID the timer belongs to

tag_task_id.description: Task ID to attach the tag to

timer_id.description: Ticketeer timer ID to sync to Harvest

task_id.description: Task ID associated with the timer

target.description: Webhook URL to deliver events to

requestBody.description: Add `?source={boardUUID}` to duplicate an existing board instead of creating a blank one.

toggleFavourite.description: If true, toggles the board favourite state instead of editing

requestBody.description: Send either toggleFavourite or board fields — not both.
Send one field at a time. Changing password requires both new_pass and old_pass.

board_id.description: UUID of board to transfer to this company

user_mail.description: Email address of user to add to company

budget_boards.description: JSON array of board IDs included in budget

budget_customers.description: JSON array of customer IDs included in budget

budget_value.description: Budget value (seconds for time budgets, currency units for fixed)

budget_user.description: User ID to scope budget to (0 for all users)

budget_boards.description: JSON array of board IDs included in budget

budget_customers.description: JSON array of customer IDs included in budget

budget_value.description: Budget value (seconds for time budgets, currency units for fixed)

budget_user.description: User ID to scope budget to (0 for all users)

date.description: The date to mark as a day off (YYYY-MM-DD)

company_customer_boards.description: JSON array of associated board IDs

rates.description: Array of rate objects with fromDate and rate

get.description: Returns file contents. For images, add `?width=` and `?height=` to get a resized WebP thumbnail.

BearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from POST /login. Expires after 15 minutes.
